title: Monster Eggs
description: Adds monster eggs blocks to caves
body:
Ever wandered around a Minecraft cave and felt like they were too peaceful? Ever wanted mob egg blocks? Introducing "Monster Eggs"!

This mod introduces egg blocks that hatch into different hostile mobs. The generation can be tweaked or disabled in the config.

The current implemented egg block variants are:
  • Cave Spider
  • Creeper
  • Enderman
  • Skeleton
  • Spider
  • Zombie

Need a server? Get 20% off your first month by using promo code "mrbysco"

For questions feel free to join my Discord. ## Want to support us? ##

  -Mrbysco
